productDisplayName: Palm Tree Girls Milan White Top
description: Style Note Get your little one ready for a trip out in this top from palm tree. The print on the front adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals. Product Details White Top, has a round neck, is sleeveless and has graphic print and sequin detail on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
